findings.claim: Route add/update command shape is not browser-safe.
findings.note: Add/update require --file or --stdin route object input, and update also requires --route.

findings.claim: Route schema requires a complete canonical route object.
findings.note: The browser must not become the object constructor for this schema.

findings.claim: Web allowlists do not admit create/update/draft route actions.
findings.note: Only validate, check, enable, disable, remove, profile, and evidence capture are present.

findings.claim: Secret values remain server-side and permission-gated.
findings.note: The repo validates secret references and excludes secret_ref/path material from readonly web snapshots.

findings.claim: Previous admission history already blocks route create/update until bounded contracts exist.
findings.note: This contour does not provide the missing server packet, so admission cannot advance.

findings.claim: Visual draft inventory does not grant implementation or product admission.
findings.note: Route builder draft and secret selector are admission-required surfaces.

findings.claim: Preflight-only admission would mix UI collection with missing server construction and secret-reference contracts.
findings.note: Preflight cannot be admitted as a loophole around the missing builder and secret selector packet.

negative_assertions.assertion: No product UI route create action is admitted.
No product UI route update action is admitted.
No product UI route draft action is admitted.
No secret reference selector is admitted.
No preflight-only create/update escape hatch is admitted.
Existing disabled-route remove admission is not widened.

next_safe_action: Choose a later contour to design a server-owned route template packet and a safe opaque secret reference packet before any route create/update UI implementation.
